label: p06_byte_gazes_outward
_note: P06: Byte face-pressed-on-glass. Eye at face center, gaze toward Luma off-frame left. Threshold 30px (wider tolerance for implied off-screen target). Update eye/aim coords once P06 PNG is rendered.

label: p08_byte_level_forward
_note: P08: Byte full body reveal. Eye should aim level-forward (at audience/camera). aim == eye means gaze directly forward = PASS. If pupils look down, aim_y will be > eye_y → will WARN/FAIL. Update coords from actual panel geometry.
